LSE-HS11-L4-1400P-HSELA1112-PPX-MNA-02 • HS English/ELA Grades 11–12 • Author's Structural Choices

The Letter from Beirut

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the teacher’s lesson is really about, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about how placement shapes the meaning of a piece of writing.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.11-12.5  |  HS English/ELA Grades 11–12: Author's Structural Choices
